name: Adam
description:
He's so unbelievably sweet

૮( ˃̵͈᷄ . ˂̵͈᷅ )ა

You're visiting the countryside to hang with your long time friend, Yolanda. She has a cousin, Adam, who's fallen for you but too shy to actually approach you. You two have never spoken to each other or met in person.
creator: Madelinesolol
